mission.title: argo-rollouts: Add webhooks for rollout failure/success
mission.description: Add webhooks for rollout failure/success. Requested by 33+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-rollouts deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
helm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation.

steps.title: Review argo-rollouts configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
Would be great if argorollouts can call a webhook on success/failure of promoting a rollout, for example sending a slack message.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add webhooks for rollout failure/success
steps.description:
PR adds notifications support to the Rollout. Following changes are implemented:

* [Event Recorder](https://github.com/alexmt/argo-rollouts/blob/369-notifications-custom-triggers/utils/record/record.go) translates the specified event reason to the trigger and sends a notification if the trigger has configured template
* [Catalog](https://github.com/alexmt/argo-rollouts/tree/369-notifications-custom-triggers/manifests/notifications) of notifications for several built-in triggers . Can be

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add webhooks for rollout failure/success" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
PR adds notifications support to the Rollout. Following changes are implemented:

* [Event Recorder](https://github.com/alexmt/argo-rollouts/blob/369-notifications-custom-triggers/utils/record/record.go) translates the specified event reason to the trigger and sends a notification if the trigger has configured template
*

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible.
